# DevAITools.com

> AI tools, APIs, and development resources for software engineers

DevAITools.com is an independent resource covering AI development tools, APIs, coding assistants, MCP servers, prompt engineering, and practical guides for software engineers integrating AI into their workflows.

## Topics
- AI coding assistants (Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, Cursor, Windsurf)
- LLM APIs and SDKs (Claude API, OpenAI, Gemini, open-source models)
- MCP (Model Context Protocol) development and servers
- AI testing and evaluation frameworks
- Prompt engineering patterns and best practices
- AI-powered DevOps and CI/CD tools
- Code review and quality tools with AI

## Contact
- Website: https://devaitools.com
- Publisher: FlipFactory Editorial Team
